positive: Minimalist jungle exploration scene, centered composition, featuring a stylized silhouette of a monkey swinging through thick, vibrant foliage. The background should be a deep tropical canopy rendered in deep emerald greens and teals, contrasted by stark white and burnt orange accents from exotic flowers and beams of sunlight breaking through the leaves. High contrast, crisp outlines, limited color palette, vector art style, suitable for screen printing on apparel, highly detailed yet flat and graphically clean. Golden ratio composition, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting.
